text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't kick yourself about it! Winnin' and
losin's all a game of luck!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya did your best for me. That's all I could ask for!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ya did your best for me. That's all I could ask for!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mooon, quit it with the gloomy face! Let's go
grab somethin' tasty to cheer up!
